title: Bastardiastrum tricarpellatum
taxonomy: Bastardiastrum tricarpellatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the subfamily Carduoideae, which includes thistle and artichoke species. The plant's classification is further supported by its similarities in morphology and genetic characteristics with other members of the Carduoideae subfamily. Bastardiastrum tricarpellatum is a part of the tribe Cardueae, which includes several genera of thistle and related plants. This classification is based on various taxonomic studies and phylogenetic analysis of the plant's genetic makeup.
